comment:
Замена: \(3^x=t\)
$$\frac{2}{t+27}\geq\frac{1}{t-27}\\ \frac{2}{t+27}-\frac{1}{t-27}\geq 0\\ \frac{2t-54-t-27}{(t+27)(t-27)}\geq 0\\ \frac{t-81}{(t+27)(t-27)}\geq 0$$
Применим метод интервалов:
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
\begin{cases}
t >-27\\
t< 27
\end{cases}\\
t\geq 81
\end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
\begin{cases}
3^{x} >-27\\
3^{x} < 27
\end{cases}\\
3^{x} \geq 81
\end{array} \right.$$
Т.к. \(3^x>0\), то:
$$\displaystyle \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
3^{x} < 3^{3}\\
3^{x} \geq 81
\end{array} \right. \Rightarrow \left[ \begin{array}{l l}
x< 3\\
x\geq 4
\end{array} \right.$$
Ответ: \(x\in (-\infty ;3)\cup [4;+\infty)\).
